title: plectranthus shikokianus var. occidentalis
intro: Plectranthus shikokianus var. occidentalis, also known as the Blue Spur Flower, is a plant species belonging to the Lamiaceae family, characterized by its blue, tubular flowers and hairy leaves. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Plectranthus shikokianus var. occidentalis include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
